page_content:
ARTH320 Fourteenth and Fifteenth-Century Northern European Art (3 Credits) The art of northern Europe with an emphasis on painting in the Netherlands and France.

ARTH351 Picturing Contemporary Life: Art Since 1945 (3 Credits) Visual art since 1945, with an emphasis on North America and Europe.

ARTH321 Northern European Art of the 16th Century: Art in the Age of Renaissance and Reformation (3 Credits) Painting in France, Germany, England, and the Low Countries during the Renaissance and Reformation.

ARTH357 History of Photography (3 Credits) An exploration of the historical, social, aesthetic, and technological developments of the photographic medium and its relationship to other modes of visual representation in the creation of the modern world. Credit Only Granted for: ARTH357 or ARTH457.

ARTH359 Film as Art (3 Credits) The study of ﬁlm as a visual art, from theoretical, cultural and aesthetic perspectives. Content varies by semester. Repeatable to: 6 credits if content differs.

47

48

ARTH - Art History & Archaeology

ARTH360 History of American Art to 1876 (3 Credits) Painting, sculpture, architecture, and decorative arts in North America from the colonial period to 1876.
